nameMeanings.name: Parton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Parton; most are named with Old English peretūn ‘pear orchard’ (a compound of pere ‘pear’ + tūn ‘enclosure’, with later change of -er- to -ar-, a regular phonetic development in Middle English). There are examples in Gloucestershire, two in Cumbria, and one in Kircudbrightshire, Scotland.

variants.name: Partain
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Parton  .

variants.name: Parten
meanings: German: variant of Parthen, from the personal name Part(h)en, ultimately derived from Greek Parthenios, from parthenos ‘virginal, pure, undefiled’. This was a name borne by two martyrs of the early Christian Church. The surname Parten is very rare in Germany.
English: variant of   Parton  . This surname is very rare in Britain.
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Parten in northern Norway, the definite form singular of part ‘part, parcel (of a property)’. This surname is very rare in Norway.

nameMeanings.name: Floyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the Welsh surname, in origin a variant of Lloyd . This form of the name results from an attempt to represent the sound of the Welsh initial Ll- using traditional English pronunciation and orthography. From the 1890s to the 1930s it was at its most popular in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: Floyd A Parton was born in 1370, in Little Bentley, Essex, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son with De Irmingland. He died in Sharrington, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Sharrington, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Floyd A Partonは1370年にイギリスイギリスエセックスリットル ベントリーで生まれた。彼はDe Irminglandとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼はイギリスイギリスノーフォルクシャリントンで死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクシャリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Floyd A Parton(은)는 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 벤틀리에서 태어났다. 그는 De Irmingland(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 샤링턴에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 샤링턴에 묻혔다.
